case_title: HARCOURT HOTEL PARTNERS VS. YASIN ATTIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARCOURT HOTEL PARTNERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ATTIA, YASIN DBA JERUSALEM MARKET ALL OCCUPANTS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1100-1102 SUTTER STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY $10,400.00 RENT, $1,425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $600.00 COSTS, $3,212.00 $2,750 HOLDOVER DAMAGES & $462 LATE FEES PER LEASE, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,637.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
